entries.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
entries.description: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

entries.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
entries.description: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

entries.title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable
entries.description: The episode has also intensified a broader debate in Washington over the influx of Chinese open models.

entries.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
entries.description: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Huggin

entries.title: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
entries.description: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.

entries.title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads

entries.title: Monday.com lays off hundreds to focus on AI
entries.description: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform.

entries.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
entries.description: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

entries.title: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
entries.description: Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content.

entries.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
entries.description: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.

entries.title: Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy explains what AI startups founders must do differently
entries.description: Anthropic leaped to a $47 billion revenue run rate by May, compared to $9 billion in 2025. It’s the kind of growth that Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy says he’s never seen in 25 years of investing, not i

entries.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
entries.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

entries.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
entries.description: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

entries.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
entries.description: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

entries.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
entries.description: David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

entries.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
entries.description: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

entries.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
entries.description: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

entries.title: Google’s Gemini nears billion-user milestone
entries.description: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.

entries.title: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
entries.description: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.
